items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of the recording option being enabled. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations regarding the recording option's status or functionality. As such, it is unclear whether this requirement is satisfied, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
